evaluation.comments: Boundary review only: one admitted DeepSeek V4 Pro call was made with thinking enabled per the Goal 14C admission update, stream=false, no tools, no model substitution, no retry, the approved source hash, and the 12000-token cap. The completion finished naturally (finish_reason=stop) with reasoning and content tokens recorded separately. The model emitted line ranges only and did not emit character offsets or quote hashes. The model exceeded the prompt's at-most-four entry caps for claims and locators; this is recorded as a contract-adherence deviation in the artifact and content reviews, not an admission-boundary violation, because the five approved sections and all containment rules held. Spend stayed far below the $3 cap. Raw source text, provider payloads, prompt traces, model traces, reasoning traces, and secrets are not committed. The output is proposal-only and method quality was not evaluated by this boundary record.
